sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115540" key="yeudo/paton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδό-πατον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n115540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">false pavement</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">floor,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.10.12.3a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
